name: Emerald Resources Nl
analysis: It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.0000, stop A$4.6926, target A$6.6100 (0.47:1) — then trail it.
